summary: Create Event feature (POST /api/events) tested successfully. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified via Playwright - Create Event button visible, dialog opens with form fields, form validation works, event creation successful with toast confirmation, new events appear in list with 'Start Prep' CTA button.

minor.issue: Backend accepts empty name field (validation only on frontend). Consider adding Pydantic min_length validation for name field.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: EventHome.js correctly implements CreateEventDialog with all required fields (name, type, date, location, expectedSchools)
Frontend form validation works - shows toast 'Please fill in name, date, and location' on empty submit
POST /api/events endpoint returns correct response with id, checklist, prepStatus=not_started
Events with no athlete_ids are correctly shown to coaches (ownership.py filter updated)
New events have correct 5-item default checklist
Event status correctly set based on date: future=upcoming, past=past

All data-testid attributes present: create-event-button, create-event-dialog, create-event-name, create-event-type, create-event-date, create-event-location, create-event-schools, create-event-submit, create-event-cancel
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test events with prefix 'TEST' for pytest verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Create Event feature fully tested. POST /api/events creates events with: unique id (event_xxx), 5-item checklist, prepStatus=not_started, status based on date. Events page at /events has 'Create Event' button top-right, dialog with name/type/date/location/expectedSchools fields. New events appear in list with 'Start Prep' CTA that navigates to /events/{id}/prep. data-testid selectors: create-event-button, create-event-dialog, create-event-name, create-event-type, create-event-date, create-event-location, create-event-schools, create-event-submit, create-event-cancel, event-card-{id}, event-action-{id}.

Create Event button visible with data-testid='create-event-button' - PASS
Create Event dialog opens on button click - PASS
Form fields present: name, type, date, location, expectedSchools - PASS
Submit and Cancel buttons present - PASS
Form validation: empty submit shows toast 'Please fill in name, date, and location' - PASS
Successful form submission: fills form, submits, dialog closes - PASS
Toast 'Event created' appears after success - PASS
New event appears in list with correct data - PASS
Event card has 'Start Prep' CTA button - PASS
Start Prep button navigates to /events/{id}/prep - PASS
Existing events (College Exposure Camp) still display correctly - PASS
